name: Megalith Anastasis
name_jp: メガリス・アナスタシス
desc:
You can discard 1 card; add 2 "Megalith" monsters (1 Level 4 or lower and 1 Level 8 or higher) from your Deck to your hand. You can only use this effect of "Megalith Anastasis" once per turn. Once per turn, if you Ritual Summon a "Megalith" monster (except during the Damage Step): You can activate 1 of these effects (but you can only use each of these effects of "Megalith Anastasis" once per turn);
● Draw 2 cards, then discard 1 card.
● Tribute 1 monster your opponent controls.

misc: Requires control of specific Monster card type
